evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for a Node.js TypeScript API. It should run lint, tests (with a PostgreSQL service container), build a Docker image, push to GitHub Container Registry, and deploy to staging automatically. Production deployment should require manual approval.
evals.expected_output: A .github/workflows/ci.yml with jobs for: lint, test (with postgres service), build-and-push Docker image, deploy-staging (auto on main), deploy-prod (manual approval via environment). Includes proper caching and secret usage.
expectations: Workflow has separate jobs for lint, test, build, deploy-staging, deploy-prod
Test job includes a postgres service container
Build job pushes Docker image to ghcr.io using GITHUB_TOKEN
Deploy-staging triggers automatically on push to main
Deploy-prod uses environment with manual approval (environment: production)
npm dependencies are cached between runs

evals.prompt: Set up GitLab CI for a Python FastAPI project. Include stages for linting (ruff, mypy), testing with pytest (and a postgres service), building a Docker image, and deploying to a staging environment on the main branch.
evals.expected_output: A .gitlab-ci.yml with stages: lint, test, build, deploy. Lint uses ruff and mypy. Test includes postgres service. Build pushes to GitLab Container Registry. Deploy runs only on main branch.
expectations: Pipeline uses GitLab CI/CD stages (lint, test, build, deploy)
Lint stage runs ruff and mypy
Test stage includes postgres as a service
Build stage uses $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE for Docker image naming
Deploy stage is restricted to main branch only
Python dependencies are cached using cache: paths:
